name: Eliza
description: Autonomous agents for everyone. A framework for creating and deploying AI agents that evolve over time.

name: SuperAGI
description: A dev-first open source autonomous AI agent framework. Enabling developers to build, manage and run useful autonomous agents.

name: Agent Zero
description: General-purpose AI agent framework that learns and evolves through interaction.

name: Agents (aiwaves)
description: An open-source framework for data-centric, self-evolving autonomous language agents.

name: evolver
description: The GEP-powered self-evolution engine for AI agents. Genome Evolution Protocol enables agents to evolve autonomously.

name: EvoAgentX

name: Agent0
description: Self-evolving agent framework from UNC/Salesforce/Stanford. Improves without human-curated datasets via curriculum and executor agent competition.

name: Darwin Godel Machine
description: Open-ended evolution of self-improving agents. Agents that rewrite their own code to improve performance.

name: OpenEvolve

name: Ouroboros

name: Alita
description: Generalist Agent enabling scalable agentic reasoning with minimal predefinition and maximal self-evolution.

name: SEAgent
description: Self-Evolving Computer Use Agent with Autonomous Learning from Experience.

description: Production-ready AI agent memory with scalable long-term memory. The memory layer for personalized AI.

description: Memory layer for AI Agents. Replace complex RAG pipelines with a serverless, single-file memory layer.

name: memU
description: Memory system for 24/7 proactive agents. Persistent memory across sessions and platforms.

name: Acontext
description: Open-source skill memory layer for AI agents. Automatically captures learnings from agent runs and stores them as reusable skill files.

name: EverMemOS
description: Long-term memory for 24/7 AI agents across LLMs and platforms.

name: A-MEM
description: Agentic Memory for LLM Agents. Self-organizing memory that autonomously manages what to remember and forget.

name: mcp-memory-service

description: A curated knowledge base on AI memory for LLMs and agents, covering long-term memory, reasoning, retrieval, and system design.

name: MemSkill

name: Aetherius
description: A private, locally-operated AI Assistant with realistic Long Term Memory and thought formation using Open Source LLMs.

name: nocturne_memory

name: Awesome-Agent-Memory
description: Curated systems, benchmarks, and papers on memory for LLMs/MLLMs -- long-term context, retrieval, and reasoning.
